full_text:
Cao Xie 曹協
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Xie (曹協). Died before Cao Pi could enfeoff him like his brothers. Cao Xie was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Xie lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
